problem: Musculoskeletal pain and related chronic conditions drive significant healthcare costs and lost productivity. Traditional care is fragmented, with limited access to specialists and poor patient engagement.
solution: AI-powered whole-person care platform combining human clinical specialists with AI care specialists. Delivers virtual physical therapy with 3.2:1 gross savings ratio, 50% reduction in surgeries, and 67% of members becoming pain-free. FDA-listed digital therapeutic.
